orgPolicy.title: FY27 Company KRs — Final Review, Ratification July 1
orgPolicy.summary: Five objectives total; Objective 5 most relevant to Invite covering job family consolidation and hiring within Gusto hubs. DRIs landing recommended targets this week ahead of State of G.
bullets: Four KRs under Objective 5 directly affect how and where we hire
New Product/Agentic category focused on Gus (Gusto's agentic platform)
Ratification expected July 1

tp.point: FY27 hiring KRs are being finalized — Objective 5 shapes where and how we hire. More details incoming after July 1 ratification.

orgPolicy.title: Raising the Talent Bar — C2 Priority, Kristin as DRI
orgPolicy.summary: Kristin is a named DRI alongside Dashini Jeyathurai on this Cycle 2 priority spanning pre-hire (VMA+ evolution), PE enablement, and FY27 talent system design.
bullets: Pre-hire: VMA+ evolution
Development: PE enablement
Quarterly performance: FY27 talent system design
Expect more from Kristin as execution pushes forward

orgPolicy.title: Laura on Leave — Elan Bailey is Day-to-Day POC
orgPolicy.summary: Laura Lockwood started leave effective June 22. Elan Bailey is the day-to-day point of contact for People Central. Saumya Chopra and Kristin available for escalations.
bullets: Effective June 22
Elan Bailey: day-to-day POC for People Central
Escalations: Saumya Chopra or Kristin Ruehle

tp.point: Laura is on leave. Loop in Elan Bailey for People Central questions; escalate to Kristin if needed.

orgPolicy.title: Invite PE Elevated Self-Service in Greenhouse
orgPolicy.summary: PEs can now create Evergreens & Confidential reqs directly in Greenhouse and close/re-open reqs without submitting a ticket.
bullets: Create Evergreens & Confidential reqs directly in GH — no ticket needed
Close & re-open your reqs in GH — no ticket needed
EIB bulk req uploads: still submit via PHC, now handled by HRIS Ops

tp.point: PEs can now create Evergreens, confidential reqs, and close/re-open reqs in GH without a ticket.

orgPolicy.title: Updated Relocation Documents for California
orgPolicy.summary: Effective June 18, a new dropdown in offer details asks whether a relocating candidate is moving to California. This determines which relocation docs get generated (CA has specific clawback language).
bullets: Effective June 18
New dropdown in offer details: 'Is the candidate relocating to California?' — Yes or No
California candidates receive relocation docs with CA-specific repayment/clawback language

tp.point: For any candidate opting into relocation, answer the new California question correctly in offer details — it controls which documents get generated.

orgPolicy.title: Compensation Bands Now Live in Workday — GSheets Deprecated
orgPolicy.summary: The GSheets comp bands are no longer functioning. A live Workday report is now available — search by job family to pull salary ranges and comp bands across all levels and zones.
bullets: GSheets comp bands are broken — stop using them
New: live Workday report, searchable by Job Family
Returns all ranges across levels and comp zones
Bookmark: https://wd5.myworkday.com/gusto/d/inst/1422$5089/rel-task/3001$14.htmld
All Job Requisitions in Workday now have comp bands assigned

tp.point: The GSheets comp bands are gone. Bookmark the Workday report and use it for all comp band lookups going forward.

keyEvents.theme: Project Orbit — New Quarterly Mentorship Program

items.heading: Project Orbit launched: quarterly PE mentorship & coaching for FTEs
bullets: Each quarter: one formal 1:1 coaching conversation with a rotating PE mentor
Not a performance process — space for career growth and development
Survey due TODAY June 26, 5pm PT
FTEs only; pairings based on survey input

keyEvents.theme: Invite PE Hub — New Centralized Notion Workspace

items.heading: Kristin launched the Invite PE Hub in Notion
bullets: Sections: Cascade to Your Teams, PE Action Items, Parking Lot, Weekly Meeting Notes
React with 📋 in #invite-pes to auto-log action items to the hub
Items auto-archive once all PEs mark complete or N/A

keyEvents.theme: AI Fluency vs. Functional Expertise — Onsite Discussion Topic

items.heading: Lisa raised: should we pass on strong candidates who lack AI experience?
bullets: Surfacing most in Sales Leadership — passing on candidates with strong functional backgrounds but limited AI experience
Question raised: could an AI onboarding course close that gap?
Proposed onsite discussion: how we're making calls today, what the market looks like, whether a different framework is needed

keyEvents.theme: Workday ↔ Google Calendar Integration Now Live

items.heading: Time off submitted in Workday now auto-syncs to Google Calendar
bullets: No more manual calendar blocks when submitting time off in Workday
Syncs to both employee calendar and PE's calendar
